After Aliquis {{Tera}}stallized the {{pkmn|category|Magician Pokémon}}, Nemona also Terastallized Tauros.
<!-- Do not add Wild Charge to Tauros's list of known moves. He was shown using an Electric-type move against Aliquis's Flamigo and it's implied to be Wild Charge due to it being the only Electric-type move Tauros can learn, but it was not outright stated as such, so don't assume. -->

Tauros's known moves are {{m|Double-Edge}} and {{m|Close Combat}}.}}
